title: Creativity Is Contrarian Investing In Ideas

title: The Anatomy of Environments that Produce Original Work
preview_text:
The most dangerous thing you can do to an idea is judge it early. Originality often disappears at that exact moment. It gets misattributed to talent and intensity.
In practice, it follows sequence.

title: The Last Artists Who Made Things With Their Hands Are Alive Right Now and Nobody Is Paying Attention
preview_text:
